description: Drupal Views exposed filter form used on news and events listing pages, providing a text search input and optional date filter with a submit button.

stories.name: NewsSearch
stories.description: Basic news search form with text input and Apply button

stories.name: EventsSearch
stories.description: Events search form with text input, date filter, and Search button

props.searchLabel: Search by title, venue or description

notes: The form uses Drupal-generated IDs and data-drupal-selector attributes; these are omitted from props as they are CMS-generated identifiers. The submit button uses classes 'success button radius js-form-submit form-submit' — hardcode these. The text input uses class 'form-text' and the date input uses class 'form-date'. The form-item wrappers use multiple Drupal classes (js-form-item, form-item, js-form-type-textfield, etc.) which should be hardcoded. The form-actions wrapper uses classes 'form-actions js-form-wrapper form-wrapper'.
